mapper.select: select s2.id as goodsName from t_shop_goods_published s1 left join zhishu_shop_goods s2 on s1.shop_goods_id = s2.id where s1.shop_id = #{shopId} and s1.del_flag = 0

select p.id,p.platform_id,s.mall_id,s.shop_key,shop_type,s.token,g.isbn,g.art_no,g.price,g.inventory from t_shop_goods_published p left join t_shop s on p.shop_id = s.id left join zhishu_shop_goods g on p.shop_goods_id = g.id where p.platform_id = #{platformId}

select p.id,p.shop_id,p.platform_id,s.id,s.mall_id,s.shop_key,shop_type,s.token,g.isbn,g.art_no,g.price,g.inventory,s.shop_name from t_shop_goods_published p left join t_shop s on p.shop_id = s.id left join zhishu_shop_goods g on p.shop_goods_id = g.id where p.shop_goods_id = #{shopGoodsId}
select * from t_shop_goods_published where shop_id = #{shopId} and shop_goods_id = #{goodsId}

select p.*,g.isbn,g.art_no,g.price,g.inventory from t_shop_goods_published p left join zhishu_shop_goods g on p.shop_goods_id = g.id where p.shop_id = #{shopId} and p.platform_id = #{platformId} limit 1
